title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 430.210 - Lienor may proceed by replevin
text:
430.210.  Lienor may proceed by replevin. — For the purpose of enforcing such lien upon default in the payment of the sum secured, the lienor may proceed by replevin in any court of competent jurisdiction and possess himself of the encumbered property, and hold the same subject to such judgment as he shall recover.
(RSMo 1939 § 3586) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3196; 1919 § 7256; 1909 § 8244
